text: Stepping from the bright, sterile hallway into this R+D exhibit stirs my sense of curiosity. The promise of innovation and the merging of humanity with intelligent machines confront me with both anticipation and a trace of unease. I feel like I am standing on the threshold of the future, invited to ponder my own relationship to technology and progress. The vivid colors and interactive displays energize my thoughts, making me reflect on the boundaries between creator and creation.
